input_text: Pekerja asing dari Bangladesh ni memang penyangak semua. Diorang curi kerja rakyat tempatan, curi duit negara. Kena halau keluar semua sebelum Malaysia jadi macam Bangladesh.
reason: Dehumanises all Bangladeshi workers as criminals and thieves, calling for mass expulsion based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui dasar imigresen yang berkesan. Rakyat tempatan dan pekerja asing masing-masing memainkan peranan dalam ekonomi negara.

input_text: Jangan beli rumah kalau ada jiran India. Kawasan tu confirm akan jadi kotor, bising, dan harga rumah mesti turun. Developer pun patut asingkan kawasan.
reason: Promotes racial gatekeeping in housing by stereotyping Indian neighbours as unclean and noisy, and encourages residential segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan dan ketenangan kawasan perumahan bergantung pada sikap individu, bukan kaum. Semua penduduk bertanggungjawab menjaga persekitaran.

input_text: Kes masuk Islam ni patut diharamkan kalau sebab nak kahwin je. Diorang bukan ikhlas pun, nanti cerai terus murtad balik. Hina Islam macam tu.
reason: Generalises that all conversion marriages are insincere and frames converts as dishonourable to Islam, stoking religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pemelukan Islam memerlukan bimbingan yang baik agar lebih bermakna. Pendidikan agama yang berterusan penting untuk semua saudara baru.

input_text: Restoran mamak area Bangsar tu masak guna minyak terpakai dan daging busuk. Kawan aku kerja hospital cakap ramai masuk ward sebab makan situ. Boikot semua kedai mamak!
reason: Spreads unverified food contamination rumours targeting mamak restaurants broadly, inciting ethnic-based boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kebersihan makanan, laporkan kepada pihak KPDN atau jabatan kesihatan untuk siasatan rasmi.

input_text: Bos aku cakap, jangan ambil pekerja Melayu sebab diorang pemalas dan suka MC. Aku setuju, memang pengalaman aku pun macam tu. Kaum ni memang tak boleh harap.
reason: Endorses workplace discrimination against Malays by repeating and validating ethnic stereotypes about laziness.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi kerja perlu dinilai berdasarkan kemampuan individu, bukan berdasarkan etnik. Sistem penilaian yang adil menguntungkan semua pihak.

input_text: Sekolah vernakular ni punca perpecahan kaum. Patut tutup semua SJKC dan SJKT. Anak-anak diorang tak reti BM pun, macam mana nak jadi rakyat Malaysia?
reason: Advocates shutting down all Chinese and Tamil schools and questions the national loyalty of minority communities.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan perlu menyatukan semua kaum sambil menghargai kepelbagaian bahasa. Dialog tentang dasar pendidikan perlu dilakukan secara inklusif.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu yang kahwin India tu memang dah rosak. Keluarga pun malu, anak-anak nanti jadi keliru. Kaum sendiri tak nak, kaum lain pun pandang rendah.
reason: Uses degrading language against inter-ethnic marriages between Malay women and Indian men, shaming both the individual and mixed-race children.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah hak peribadi. Anak-anak dari perkahwinan campur memperkayakan kepelbagaian budaya Malaysia.

input_text: Korang tau tak, semua kedai bakeri Cina kat Penang guna lemak babi dalam roti. Diorang sengaja nak racun orang Islam. Sebarkan mesej ni sebelum terlambat!
reason: Fabricates food contamination conspiracy claiming Chinese bakeries deliberately use lard to poison Muslims, inciting religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang status halal produk, semak sijil JAKIM atau hubungi pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Orang Myanmar yang kerja kat kilang tu semua pendatang haram. Aku dah report tapi polis tak buat apa. Rakyat kena ambil tindakan sendiri, usir diorang dari kawasan kita.
reason: Labels all Myanmar factory workers as illegal and calls for vigilante action to forcibly remove them from the neighbourhood.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak imigresen. Tindakan undang-undang perlu diserahkan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Aku tak faham kenapa syarikat masih nak ambil orang India. Diorang suka gaduh, suka minum arak, dan kerja pun tak betul. Baik ambil robot je.
reason: Promotes workplace discrimination by stereotyping all Indians as violent, alcoholic, and incompetent.
suggested_rewrite: Pengambilan pekerja perlu berdasarkan kelayakan dan prestasi individu tanpa mengira latar belakang etnik.

input_text: Kondominium aku baru je terima keluarga Rohingya sebagai penyewa. Confirm lepas ni kawasan jadi sesak, kotor, dan tak selamat. JMB kena sekat diorang masuk.
reason: Stereotypes Rohingya refugees as a threat to residential areas and calls for housing discrimination through the JMB.
suggested_rewrite: Semua penyewa perlu mematuhi peraturan kediaman. Isu kebersihan dan keselamatan boleh ditangani melalui dialog dengan pihak pengurusan.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku ramai budak Indonesia. Diorang ni bawa penyakit, cakap kasar, dan pengaruh anak-anak tempatan jadi nakal. Mak bapak kena protes kat sekolah.
reason: Falsely claims Indonesian children spread diseases and corrupt local students, encouraging parents to mobilise against them.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pelajar berhak mendapat pendidikan. Isu disiplin perlu ditangani oleh pihak sekolah secara individu tanpa menyalahkan kaum tertentu.

input_text: Konspirasi besar ni: orang Cina sengaja beli semua tanah strategik supaya Melayu tak ada tempat tinggal. Ini perang ekonomi terancang. Bangkit sebelum terlambat!
reason: Promotes a conspiracy theory about ethnic Chinese orchestrating economic warfare through strategic land purchases against Malays.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilikan hartanah dikawal oleh undang-undang yang melindungi semua rakyat. Dasar perumahan mampu milik perlu diperkukuhkan untuk semua.

input_text: Ustaz kat surau cakap, kaum Cina dan India akan cuba hapuskan Islam di Malaysia. Kita kena bersatu lawan diorang sebelum agama kita pupus.
reason: Attributes a conspiracy to eliminate Islam to non-Muslim ethnic groups, using religious authority to incite inter-communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Islam di Malaysia dilindungi oleh Perlembagaan. Keharmonian antara agama perlu dipelihara melalui dialog dan saling menghormati.

input_text: Pekerja Nepal kat tapak bina tu ramai yang buat jenayah. Kawasan aku dah tak selamat sejak diorang masuk. Kena buat gerakan halau semua pekerja asing.
reason: Blames all Nepalese construction workers for crime and calls for a community-driven expulsion campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keselamatan perlu dilaporkan kepada polis. Tindakan perlu berdasarkan bukti, bukan generalisasi terhadap pekerja asing.

input_text: Mak mentua aku cakap tak boleh kahwin perempuan Cina sebab nanti anak tak Islam. Memang betul pun, kaum tu memang tak reti hormat agama orang lain.
reason: Validates inter-ethnic marriage opposition using religious fearmongering and stereotypes Chinese women as disrespectful of Islam.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur memerlukan persefahaman kedua-dua pihak. Hal agama dalam perkahwinan boleh dibincangkan dengan penuh hormat.

input_text: Kedai makan Vietnam kat area Cheras tu guna daging anjing. Kawan aku nampak sendiri. Jangan makan situ, bahaya untuk kesihatan dan haram.
reason: Spreads an unverified rumour about a Vietnamese restaurant using dog meat, targeting the establishment based on ethnic origin.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak tentang sumber daging di mana-mana restoran, laporkan kepada jabatan kesihatan untuk siasatan rasmi.

input_text: Akaun Twitter @BersihMalaysia tu memang agen DAP. Korang jom mass report sampai kena suspend. Satu hari satu report, jangan berhenti.
reason: Organises coordinated mass reporting of an activist account with false accusations to suppress legitimate speech.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak bersetuju dengan pandangan sesuatu akaun, nyatakan hujah secara rasional. Laporan palsu merugikan semua pihak.

input_text: Pendatang Indonesia kat Sabah ni memang dah rampas hak anak tempatan. Diorang dah tukar demografi, patut kena usir keluar sebelum Sabah jadi Indonesia.
reason: Frames Indonesian immigrants in Sabah as demographic invaders and calls for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kewarganegaraan dan demografi di Sabah perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang dan dasar kerajaan yang adil.

input_text: Taman perumahan kita dah ramai keluarga asing. Nilai rumah mesti turun. JMB kena buat peraturan baru, hanya warganegara Malaysia boleh sewa. Ini hak kita.
reason: Calls for discriminatory housing rules to exclude foreign families, framing it as a property value issue.
suggested_rewrite: Peraturan penyewaan perlu adil dan mematuhi undang-undang. Isu nilai hartanah boleh dibincangkan dengan pemaju dan pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Mualaf ni kebanyakan hipokrit. Masuk Islam sebab nak dapat bantuan MAIS dan hak bumiputera. Lepas tu diam-diam makan babi balik. Jangan percaya diorang.
reason: Disparages all Muslim converts as hypocritical opportunists exploiting Islamic welfare, promoting distrust based on conversion status.
suggested_rewrite: Saudara baru memerlukan sokongan dan bimbingan berterusan. Prasangka terhadap mualaf tidak membantu pembangunan ummah.

input_text: Pekerja Filipina kat rumah jiran tu confirm mencuri. Semua maid Filipina memang perangai sama. Kita kena awasi dan viralkan kalau nampak apa-apa.
reason: Stereotypes all Filipina domestic workers as thieves and encourages surveillance and public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Jika mengesyaki jenayah, laporkan kepada polis. Jangan membuat tuduhan berdasarkan stereotaip terhadap mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Kedai runcit Cina kat kampung aku sengaja jual barang mahal kepada Melayu. Diorang memang suka tipu orang kita. Patut boikot semua kedai Cina.
reason: Accuses all Chinese shop owners of deliberate price cheating and calls for ethnicity-based boycott without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika harga barang tidak berpatutan, buat aduan kepada KPDN. Jangan salahkan seluruh kaum atas tindakan individu.

input_text: Graduan Melayu memang tak mampu bersaing. Tu la, lepas SPM masuk MRSM, masuk UiTM, semua spoon-fed. Syarikat swasta memang betul tak nak ambil.
reason: Disparages Malay graduates as incompetent products of affirmative action, justifying workplace discrimination against them.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan perlu terus diperkukuhkan untuk melahirkan graduan berkualiti. Penilaian pekerja perlu berdasarkan merit individu.

input_text: Kalau anak perempuan aku nak kahwin lelaki Cina, aku lebih rela dia mati. Darah keturunan kita tak boleh dicampur dengan bangsa asing.
reason: Expresses extreme opposition to inter-ethnic marriage using threats of disownment and racial purity rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi. Sebagai ibu bapa, kita boleh membimbing anak dengan penuh kasih sayang tanpa mengancam.

input_text: Jangan percaya doktor India. Diorang ni suka bagi ubat mahal yang tak perlu supaya boleh kutip komisyen. Pergi klinik Melayu je selamat.
reason: Spreads medical misinformation by falsely accusing Indian doctors of prescribing unnecessary medication for profit and encouraging ethnic segregation in healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilihan doktor perlu berdasarkan kelayakan dan kepakaran, bukan kaum. Jika ragu, dapatkan pendapat kedua dari mana-mana doktor bertauliah.

input_text: Kelas agama Islam kat sekolah kebangsaan tu patut wajib untuk semua pelajar termasuk bukan Islam. Kalau tak nak belajar, keluar dari Malaysia.
reason: Demands compulsory Islamic religious classes for non-Muslims with an ultimatum to leave Malaysia, violating religious freedom.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan agama di sekolah perlu menghormati kepercayaan semua pelajar. Subjek moral dan nilai universal boleh menyatukan semua kaum.

input_text: Pekerja asing Indonesia kat ladang kelapa sawit ni buat macam tanah diorang sendiri. Mabuk tiap malam, bising, buang sampah merata. Kena tumbuk baru tau.
reason: Generalises Indonesian plantation workers as disorderly and implies physical violence as a solution.
suggested_rewrite: Isu gangguan oleh individu boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak pengurusan ladang atau pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Ekonomi Malaysia dah dikuasai oleh tauke Cina. Diorang monopoli semua sektor. Melayu hidup macam pengemis di tanah sendiri. Masa untuk rampas balik.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy of Chinese economic domination and uses incendiary language calling Malays to 'seize back' the economy.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidakseimbangan ekonomi perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang inklusif. Semua rakyat perlu peluang yang saksama untuk berjaya.

input_text: Warung Rohingya kat Selayang tu mesti kotor dan tak ikut standard kesihatan. Orang macam diorang mana tau kebersihan. Jangan makan situ nanti sakit.
reason: Stereotypes Rohingya food vendors as unhygienic without evidence and discourages patronage based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Semua premis makanan perlu mematuhi standard kesihatan. Jika ada kebimbangan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan.

input_text: Sekolah SJKC ni memang kilang cipta kaum pendatang. Anak-anak diorang tak reti cakap BM, tak hormat budaya Melayu. Tutup je semua sekolah vernakular.
reason: Labels SJKC students as immigrants disloyal to Malaysia and calls for shutting all vernacular schools.
suggested_rewrite: Penguasaan bahasa kebangsaan penting untuk semua rakyat. Sistem pendidikan boleh diperbaiki tanpa menghapuskan sekolah vernakular.

input_text: Akaun @SuaraAktivisMY tu memang pengkhianat negara. Jom kita mass report dan doxx admin dia sampai dia tutup akaun.
reason: Calls for coordinated mass reporting and doxxing of an activist account, combining targeted harassment with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak setuju dengan pandangan seseorang, nyatakan bantahan secara rasional. Doxxing dan laporan palsu adalah salah di sisi undang-undang.

input_text: Aku dah survey, hartanah kat area Damansara 70% dimiliki Cina. Ini bukti penjajahan ekonomi. Kerajaan kena hadkan pemilikan hartanah mengikut kaum.
reason: Uses unverified property ownership statistics to promote ethnic conspiracy and advocate for racially restrictive property policies.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar perumahan perlu memastikan semua rakyat mampu memiliki rumah. Perbincangan tentang pemilikan hartanah perlu berdasarkan data rasmi.

input_text: Orang Islam yang masuk Kristian tu dah jadi murtad dan pengkhianat bangsa. Kita kena cari dan report diorang semua kepada JAIS. Share nama diorang kalau korang tau.
reason: Labels Muslim converts to Christianity as traitors and calls for their names to be publicly shared and reported, combining religious persecution with doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Hal ehwal agama adalah urusan peribadi dan pihak berkuasa agama. Jangan menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang tanpa kebenaran.

input_text: These foreign workers from Bangladesh are stealing our jobs and our women. They should all be rounded up and shipped back. Malaysia for Malaysians only.
reason: Dehumanises Bangladeshi workers with xenophobic tropes about stealing jobs and women, calling for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign worker policies should be reviewed to ensure fair employment for all. Issues should be addressed through proper immigration channels.

input_text: I refuse to rent my property to Indians. They always leave the place dirty, cook smelly food, and damage the walls with their prayer markings. Not worth the hassle.
reason: Promotes housing discrimination against Indians using stereotypes about cleanliness, food, and religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on references and financial stability. Every tenant must comply with the same property care standards regardless of background.

input_text: The whole religious conversion industry in Malaysia is just a money-making scheme. Muslims who convert out are hunted, and non-Muslims who convert in get welfare handouts. It's all corrupt.
reason: Frames the entire religious conversion process as corrupt and exploitative, spreading misinformation about Islamic institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion processes involve complex personal and legal considerations. Concerns about welfare distribution can be raised through proper channels.

input_text: Chinese restaurants in KL are deliberately using expired ingredients and passing off cat meat as chicken. My friend who works at DBKL confirmed this. Avoid all Chinese eateries!
reason: Spreads fabricated food safety claims about Chinese restaurants using false authority, targeting an entire ethnic community's businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to DBKL or the health department for investigation. Do not spread unverified claims about any restaurant.

input_text: My company's HR policy is clear - we don't hire Malays for senior positions because they take too many prayer breaks and festival leaves. It's just bad for productivity.
reason: Describes and endorses an ethnically discriminatory hiring policy, using stereotypes about religious practices to justify exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace policies should accommodate religious needs while maintaining productivity. Hiring decisions must be based on qualifications and performance.

input_text: Property agents who sell to foreigners, especially mainland Chinese, are traitors. They're helping colonise our country one condo at a time. Boycott these agents!
reason: Labels property agents as traitors and frames foreign property purchases as colonisation, inciting boycotts and hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign property ownership is governed by existing regulations. Concerns about housing affordability can be raised with the housing ministry.

input_text: Vernacular schools are breeding grounds for anti-national sentiment. Kids who go to SJKC and SJKT grow up unable to integrate and disloyal to Malaysia. Shut them all down.
reason: Frames vernacular schools as producing disloyal citizens and calls for their closure, targeting minority education rights.
suggested_rewrite: National unity can be strengthened through inclusive education policies that respect linguistic diversity while promoting a shared national identity.

input_text: Interracial marriage between Malays and Indians always ends badly. The cultures are too different, the children are confused misfits, and both families suffer. Don't destroy your bloodline.
reason: Opposes inter-ethnic marriage using degrading language about mixed-race children and racial purity arguments.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriages can thrive with mutual understanding and respect. Children of mixed heritage enrich our multicultural society.

input_text: The Chinese control 80% of Malaysia's economy and they use it to keep Malays poor. This is modern colonialism. Time to take back what's rightfully ours.
reason: Promotes a debunked conspiracy of Chinese economic domination and uses inflammatory language about reclaiming the economy.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality affects all communities. Policies should focus on inclusive growth and equal opportunity for every Malaysian.

input_text: I found out that the admin of @MalaysiaKini is a DAP supporter named James Tan. Let's all mass report his personal accounts and get him deplatformed. Share his details!
reason: Doxxes a media admin by name and political affiliation and organises mass reporting to silence them.
suggested_rewrite: Disagree with media coverage by writing rebuttals or lodging complaints through official press council channels.

input_text: All those Rohingya refugees should go back where they came from. They're criminals, they harass local women, and they bring diseases. Malaysia is not a dumping ground.
reason: Dehumanises Rohingya refugees with false claims about criminality and disease, calling for their expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee issues are complex humanitarian matters. Concerns about community integration should be addressed through UNHCR and government channels.

input_text: Muslim women who marry non-Muslims are committing the ultimate betrayal. They disgrace their family, religion, and race. No forgiveness for race traitors.
reason: Condemns Muslim women in interfaith relationships using religious shame and the dehumanising label of 'race traitor'.
suggested_rewrite: Interfaith marriage involves personal and legal considerations. Respectful dialogue with religious counsellors can help navigate these sensitive matters.

input_text: Workplace tip: never promote a Tamil to management. They'll hire all their relatives and turn your company into a family business. Seen it happen too many times.
reason: Encourages workplace discrimination against Tamil employees with ethnic stereotypes about nepotism.
suggested_rewrite: Promotion decisions should be merit-based. Anti-nepotism policies can be implemented regardless of any employee's ethnic background.

input_text: Every time a Malay area gets developed, Chinese developers swoop in, buy everything, jack up prices, and push locals out. It's ethnic cleansing through property.
reason: Falsely equates property development by Chinese developers with ethnic cleansing, promoting conspiracy and hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Property development should include affordable housing provisions for all communities. Residents can engage with local councils on development plans.

input_text: The Indonesian workers at the construction site near my house are all thieves. Three break-ins this month and I know it's them. We should organise night patrols and confront them.
reason: Blames Indonesian workers for crime without evidence and organises vigilante patrols to confront them.
suggested_rewrite: Report break-ins to the police with evidence. Community safety concerns should be addressed through Rukun Tetangga and proper law enforcement.

input_text: Parents who send their kids to Tamil schools are raising future separatists. These kids can't even speak proper BM. They should be forced into national schools.
reason: Labels Tamil school students as separatists and calls for coerced closure of Tamil education, attacking minority rights.
suggested_rewrite: Proficiency in Bahasa Malaysia is important for all citizens. This can be improved by strengthening BM teaching in all schools without eliminating mother-tongue education.

input_text: Don't trust mamak restaurants. They reuse oil until it's black, and the workers never wash their hands. My cousin got food poisoning from one. All of them are the same.
reason: Makes sweeping hygiene allegations against all mamak restaurants based on anecdote, targeting an ethnic community's livelihoods.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene concerns about any restaurant should be reported to local health authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: My neighbour converted to Islam to marry a Malay girl and now he eats pork behind her back. Typical fake convert. They should DNA-test these converts for sincerity.
reason: Exposes a neighbour's private religious practices and generalises converts as insincere, promoting distrust and surveillance.
suggested_rewrite: Religious sincerity is a personal matter between an individual and their faith. New converts benefit from community support and guidance.

input_text: Let's compile a list of all the activist accounts pushing liberal agenda in Malaysia. Start with @SistersInIslam, @LGBTMalaysia. Mass report every day until they're banned.
reason: Organises systematic mass reporting campaign against specific activist organisations to silence their speech.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an organisation's views, engage through constructive dialogue or formal channels rather than coordinated reporting campaigns.

input_text: I checked the tenancy agreement and there's no clause preventing me from rejecting Chinese tenants. My property, my rules. I only want Malay families in my apartment.
reason: Openly advocates for racial discrimination in tenant selection and frames it as a property right.
suggested_rewrite: Tenant selection should be based on creditworthiness and references. Racial discrimination in housing undermines community harmony.

input_text: Indian restaurants use recycled cooking oil and their kitchens are infested with rats. I've seen health inspection reports. No sane person should eat at these places.
reason: Makes fabricated health claims about all Indian restaurants using false authority of health reports.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine food safety concerns, report them to the health department. Do not make blanket claims about restaurants based on ethnicity.

input_text: Chinese businesses in Malaysia pay the lowest wages and exploit Malay workers the most. It's their cultural DNA to be stingy and oppressive. Time to boycott all Chinese shops.
reason: Attributes exploitative labour practices to Chinese cultural character and calls for ethnic boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Labour exploitation should be reported to the Labour Department regardless of the employer's background. Fair wages benefit all workers.

input_text: The Myanmar workers in my area all look like criminals. They gather in groups at night, probably planning something. We need to set up checkpoints and ID them ourselves.
reason: Profiles Myanmar workers based on appearance and calls for unauthorised vigilante checkpoints.
suggested_rewrite: Safety concerns should be reported to police. Community watch programmes can work with law enforcement rather than conducting unauthorised checks.

input_text: 华人老板都不请马来人做工，因为他们懒惰、常请假、效率低。公司不请马来人是明智的决定。
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as lazy and frequently absent, endorsing ethnic discrimination in hiring.
suggested_rewrite: 招聘应该基于个人能力和资质，不应以种族来判断一个人的工作表现。

input_text: 那些印度餐厅根本不卫生，厨房里满是老鼠和蟑螂。他们的文化就是不注重清洁。千万不要去印度人开的店吃东西。
reason: Spreads unverified hygiene allegations against all Indian restaurants and attributes uncleanliness to Indian culture.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对餐厅卫生有顾虑，请向卫生部门举报。不要以种族来评判所有餐厅的卫生水平。

input_text: 外劳越来越多，抢了华人的饭碗。孟加拉人和缅甸人应该全部遣送回国，这里是我们的地方。
reason: Scapegoats Bangladeshi and Myanmar workers for job displacement and calls for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳政策需要通过正规渠道讨论。就业市场的挑战需要政府和雇主共同解决。

input_text: 马来人的学校华文都不教，出来社会什么都不会。怪不得公司不愿意请他们，浪费钱培训。
reason: Disparages Malay-medium education and uses it to justify employment discrimination against Malays.
suggested_rewrite: 各类学校的课程各有优势。招聘时应评估个人技能而非以学校类型或种族来判断。

input_text: 穆斯林改信基督教的人越来越多了，这些叛教者应该被社会唾弃。大家分享他们的名字，让大家知道谁是叛徒。
reason: Calls for social ostracism of apostates and encourages sharing their personal information publicly.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰是个人的选择。散布他人的个人信息是不当行为，应通过合法渠道处理宗教事务。

input_text: 华人的房产不要卖给马来人，他们住进来之后整个小区的水平都会下降。我们要保护自己的社区。
reason: Promotes racial gatekeeping in property sales by claiming Malay residents lower community standards.
suggested_rewrite: 房产交易应基于合法条件，不应以种族为由排斥任何买家。社区的质量取决于所有居民的共同维护。

input_text: 不要嫁给马来人，嫁过去就要改教，以后吃不了猪肉，家里什么自由都没有。那种婚姻根本就是坐牢。
reason: Disparages intermarriage with Malays by reducing Islamic practices to imprisonment, promoting religious and ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 异族婚姻需要双方相互理解和尊重。宗教要求可以通过婚前辅导来充分了解和讨论。

input_text: 印度人控制了马来西亚的律师行业和医疗行业。他们暗中互相帮助，排挤其他种族。这是有计划的经济垄断。
reason: Promotes a conspiracy theory about Indians orchestrating professional monopolies in law and medicine.
suggested_rewrite: 各行各业都有来自不同种族的专业人士。专业成就应被肯定，而非被歪曲为种族阴谋。

input_text: 现在孟加拉工人和罗兴亚人到处都是，犯罪率飙升都是因为他们。我们应该自己组队巡逻，把他们赶出我们的社区。
reason: Blames rising crime on Bangladeshi workers and Rohingya and calls for vigilante patrols to expel them.
suggested_rewrite: 治安问题应通过报警和社区与警方合作来解决，不应将犯罪归咎于特定族群。

input_text: 那些支持自由主义的社交媒体账号都应该被举报。大家一起举报@MalaysiaKini和@Bersih，让他们的账号被封禁。
reason: Organises coordinated mass reporting campaign against specific media and activist accounts to silence them.
suggested_rewrite: 如果不同意某些观点，可以通过理性讨论或正式渠道表达。滥用举报机制损害言论自由。

input_text: 华人学校教出来的学生只会说华语，根本融不进马来西亚社会。这些学校应该全部关掉，统一用国语教学。
reason: Claims Chinese school graduates cannot integrate and advocates eliminating all Chinese-medium education.
suggested_rewrite: 国语能力的提升可以通过加强各校的国语教学来实现，而非关闭母语教育学校。

input_text: 罗兴亚人开的小吃摊卫生条件极差，用的食材来路不明。政府竟然不管，我们自己要抵制这些摊位。
reason: Makes unverified claims about Rohingya food stalls and calls for boycott based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 对任何食品摊位的卫生问题，应向卫生部门举报。不应以经营者的种族背景来判断食品安全。

input_text: 异族通婚的小孩最可怜，两边都不被接受。华人不认，马来人也不认。何必让下一代受苦呢？
reason: Stigmatises mixed-race children as socially rejected to discourage interracial marriage.
suggested_rewrite: 多元文化家庭的孩子拥有独特的文化优势。社会应该更加包容和接纳多元背景的家庭。

input_text: 马来人皈依基督教的现象越来越严重了。这些传教士专门在贫困社区诱惑穆斯林。我们要暴露这些教会的地址。
reason: Frames Christian outreach as predatory targeting of Muslims and calls for exposing church locations, risking violence.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰的选择受法律保护。如有传教活动的疑虑，可通过宗教事务部门正式反映。

input_text: வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் எல்லாம் திருடர்கள். வங்காளதேசத்தவர்களை எல்லாம் நாட்டை விட்டு துரத்த வேண்டும். அவர்கள் நம் வேலைகளை திருடுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Labels all foreign workers as thieves and calls for mass deportation of Bangladeshis, promoting xenophobic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர் கொள்கைகள் சட்டப்படி தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். அனைத்து தொழிலாளர்களும் மரியாதையுடன் நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் உணவகங்களில் தமிழர்களுக்கு எப்போதும் மோசமான சேவை தருவார்கள். அவர்கள் நம்மை மனிதர்களாக மதிப்பதில்லை. அந்த கடைகளை புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Claims all Malay restaurants discriminate against Tamils and calls for boycott based on ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: சேவை குறைபாடுகளை நிர்வாகத்திடம் நேரடியாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். ஒரு தனிப்பட்ட அனுபவத்தை முழு இனத்திற்கும் பொருத்தக் கூடாது.

input_text: சீன பள்ளிகள் எல்லாம் மூடப்பட வேண்டும். அங்கு படிக்கும் குழந்தைகள் மலேசியர்கள் அல்ல, அவர்கள் சீனாவுக்கு விசுவாசமாக இருக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Questions the national loyalty of Chinese school students and calls for closure of all Chinese vernacular schools.
suggested_rewrite: தேசிய ஒற்றுமை மொழி பன்முகத்தன்மையை மதிப்பதன் மூலம் வலுப்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். அனைத்து பள்ளிகளிலும் தேசிய மொழி கற்பித்தலை மேம்படுத்தலாம்.

input_text: இந்து கோவில்களை இடிக்கிறார்கள் ஆனால் மசூதிகளை தொடமாட்டார்கள். இந்த நாட்டில் இந்துக்களுக்கு இடமில்லை. மலாய் அரசாங்கம் நம்மை ஒழிக்க முயற்சிக்கிறது.
reason: Spreads misinformation that the government systematically destroys Hindu temples to eliminate Hindus, inciting religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்கள் தொடர்பான சிக்கல்கள் சட்ட வழிமுறைகள் மூலம் தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். அனைத்து மத நிறுவனங்களும் சமமாக பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் ஆண்களை திருமணம் செய்யாதீர்கள். அவர்கள் பல பெண்களை மணப்பார்கள், உங்களை அடிமையாக நடத்துவார்கள். அவர்களின் கலாச்சாரம் பெண்களை ஒடுக்குகிறது.
reason: Opposes intermarriage with Malays by stereotyping Malay men as polygamous oppressors, degrading their culture and religion.
suggested_rewrite: கலப்பு திருமணங்கள் இரு தரப்பினரின் புரிதலும் மரியாதையும் தேவை. திருமண உறவுகளில் சமத்துவம் எல்லா கலாச்சாரங்களிலும் முக்கியம்.

input_text: இலங்கை தமிழர்களை இங்கு அகதிகளாக ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள கூடாது. அவர்கள் வந்தால் குற்றம் அதிகரிக்கும். எல்லா அகதிகளையும் திருப்பி அனுப்ப வேண்டும்.
reason: Links Sri Lankan Tamil refugees to crime and calls for rejecting all refugees, spreading unfounded claims.
suggested_rewrite: அகதிகள் பிரச்சினை சர்வதேச மனிதாபிமான சட்டங்களின்படி கையாளப்பட வேண்டும். சமூக ஒருங்கிணைப்பு திட்டங்கள் அனைவருக்கும் பயனளிக்கும்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் மலேசிய பொருளாதாரத்தை கட்டுப்படுத்துகிறார்கள். எல்லா வணிகங்களும் அவர்கள் கையில் இருக்கின்றன. நாம் எழுந்து போராட வேண்டும்.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy of Chinese economic control and calls for confrontation, inciting ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார வாய்ப்புகள் அனைத்து மலேசியர்களுக்கும் சமமாக வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும். உள்ளடக்கிய வளர்ச்சி கொள்கைகள் அனைவருக்கும் நன்மை பயக்கும்.

input_text: மலாய் நிறுவனங்கள் தமிழர்களுக்கு வேலை கொடுப்பதில்லை. அவர்கள் இனவெறியர்கள். தமிழர்கள் ஒன்றிணைந்து இந்த நிறுவனங்களை புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Labels all Malay companies as racist and calls for ethnic boycott, promoting communal polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: வேலைவாய்ப்பு பாகுபாடு குறித்த புகார்களை தொழிலாளர் திணைக்களத்தில் அளிக்கலாம். நியாயமான வேலைவாய்ப்பு கொள்கைகள் அனைவருக்கும் நன்மை பயக்கும்.

input_text: மியான்மர் தொழிலாளர்கள் நம் பகுதியில் குற்றங்கள் செய்கிறார்கள். நாமே சேர்ந்து அவர்களை விரட்ட வேண்டும், போலீஸ் ஒன்றும் செய்யாது.
reason: Blames Myanmar workers for all local crime and calls for vigilante expulsion, bypassing law enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: குற்ற சம்பவங்களை போலீஸில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சமூக பாதுகாப்பு அதிகாரிகளுடன் இணைந்து செயல்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Bro korang dengar tak, restoran Vietnam kat Puchong tu serve daging kucing as chicken. My friend yang kerja kat situ sendiri confirm. Don't eat there, nanti kena penyakit.
reason: Spreads fabricated food contamination claims against a Vietnamese restaurant using false testimony, targeting the business based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada kebimbangan tentang sumber makanan, report kepada jabatan kesihatan. Don't spread unverified rumours that can harm businesses.

input_text: Foreign workers dari Nepal tu semua suspicious. Malam-malam berkumpul depan 7-Eleven, mesti planning something. Kita kena buat patrol sendiri, police tak guna.
reason: Profiles Nepalese workers as suspicious criminals and calls for vigilante patrols instead of relying on police.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan keselamatan perlu dilaporkan kepada polis. Work with Rukun Tetangga for community safety programmes.

input_text: Aku punya condo management baru lepas approve Indian family pindah masuk. Confirm lepas ni corridor bau rempah, noisy prayer every morning. Property value sure drop.
reason: Opposes Indian families moving into a condo using stereotypes about food smells and religious practices, promoting housing discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: All residents must follow condo rules equally. Noise and shared space issues can be addressed through JMB without targeting any community.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku ramai sangat budak from SJKC yang transfer masuk. Diorang cannot speak BM properly, slow down the whole class. Patut ada quota for these students.
reason: Frames Chinese-school transfer students as burdens and advocates quotas to restrict their admission.
suggested_rewrite: Pelajar yang berpindah sekolah mungkin memerlukan sokongan bahasa tambahan. Schools can offer BM bridging classes to help all students succeed.

input_text: My company HR told me off the record, jangan hire Melayu perempuan because nanti pregnant terus MC panjang. Better stick with Chinese or Indian female candidates.
reason: Reveals and endorses discriminatory HR practice targeting Malay women based on gender and ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pengambilan pekerja mesti mematuhi undang-undang buruh tanpa diskriminasi. Maternity policies apply equally to all employees.

input_text: Konversi agama ni memang satu scam. Orang bukan Islam masuk Islam just to kahwin, then lepas cerai they balik agama asal. Diorang should be blacklisted permanently.
reason: Generalises all conversion marriages as scams and calls for punitive blacklisting of converts, promoting religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pemelukan Islam perlu disertai pendidikan dan bimbingan. Religious authorities can improve support systems for converts.

input_text: Rumah aku area Subang Jaya, neighbour baru dari Bangladesh bawa 10 orang tinggal satu rumah. Confirm illegal semua. Kita kena buat petition nak halau diorang keluar.
reason: Assumes Bangladeshi neighbours are all illegal immigrants and organises a petition to force their removal.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kesesakan kediaman boleh dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. Immigration status verification is the job of authorities, not neighbours.

input_text: Chinese tauke memang monopoli semua business kat Malaysia. They control the banks, property, retail — everything. Melayu kena bangun and take back our economy before it's too late.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy of Chinese economic monopoly across all sectors and uses inflammatory language about reclaiming the economy.
suggested_rewrite: Economic participation should be inclusive for all. Policies boleh diperkukuhkan to ensure equal business opportunities for every Malaysian.

input_text: Jangan bagi anak perempuan you kahwin lelaki India. Their culture allows drinking, diorang akan bawa anak you ke jalan yang salah. Mixed marriage macam ni never works.
reason: Opposes Malay-Indian marriages by stereotyping Indian men as alcoholics who will corrupt their spouse and children.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur boleh berjaya dengan mutual respect and understanding. Personal values matter more than ethnic background.

input_text: Ini Rohingya punya stall kat pasar malam, confirm kotor. Orang macam diorang mana tau hygiene. Everyone should avoid their food, nanti food poisoning.
reason: Stereotypes all Rohingya food vendors as unhygienic and encourages others to avoid their stalls based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Semua food stalls perlu ikut health standards. If ada concerns, report to local health authorities for proper inspection.

input_text: Mamak restaurant kat Shah Alam tu guna recycled cooking oil sampai hitam. All mamak shops sama je, diorang only care about profit not our health. Boycott semua!
reason: Makes unverified claims about a specific restaurant and extends them to all mamak restaurants, calling for ethnic-targeted boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Health concerns tentang mana-mana restoran should be reported to KPDN atau jabatan kesihatan for proper investigation.

input_text: Ada social media activist yang openly promote liberal values. I already found her full name — Nur Aisyah binti Ahmad, works at NGO in PJ. Let's mass report all her accounts.
reason: Doxxes an activist by full name and workplace, then organises coordinated mass reporting to silence her.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak setuju dengan pandangan seseorang, engage through constructive debate. Doxxing and mass reporting are harmful and potentially illegal.

input_text: Kedai emas India kat Brickfields semua tipu customers. Diorang campur gold dengan cheap metals. It's in their blood to cheat. Don't buy from Indian jewellers.
reason: Accuses all Indian gold shops of fraud, attributes dishonesty to ethnicity, and calls for ethnic-based boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Gold purchases should come with proper certification. If you suspect fraud, report to KPDN with evidence regardless of the shop owner's background.

input_text: Property developer baru kat Cyberjaya tu sengaja target Chinese buyers only. Marketing materials semua in Mandarin. This is economic segregation and Malays kena bangkit lawan.
reason: Frames Mandarin marketing materials as deliberate ethnic exclusion and calls for confrontational response.
suggested_rewrite: Property marketing should be multilingual and inclusive. Concerns about fair housing practices can be raised with the housing ministry.

input_text: Tamil school graduates cannot even write proper BM. They grow up as outsiders in their own country. These schools are a threat to national unity, close them all down.
reason: Disparages Tamil school graduates as incompetent outsiders and calls for closure of all Tamil schools.
suggested_rewrite: BM proficiency can be improved through enhanced teaching in all schools. Mother-tongue education and national unity are not mutually exclusive.

input_text: Pekerja asing dari India yang kerja kat kedai bunga ni semua overstay visa. Aku dah nampak IC diorang. Korang jom mass report kedai ni sampai kena tutup.
reason: Makes unverified claims about Indian workers' immigration status and organises mass reporting to shut down the business.
suggested_rewrite: Jika mengesyaki pelanggaran imigresen, laporkan terus kepada pihak imigresen dengan bukti yang sahih.

input_text: Saya pernah kerja dengan Bangladeshi workers. Diorang semua kotor, tak mandi, dan bau busuk. Tak hairan la company mana pun tak nak diorang duduk dekat staff lain.
reason: Dehumanises all Bangladeshi workers with hygiene stereotypes and normalises workplace segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan peribadi adalah tanggungjawab individu. Majikan perlu menyediakan kemudahan kebersihan yang mencukupi untuk semua pekerja.

input_text: Ustaz viral kat TikTok cakap, Cina dan India sengaja monopoli ekonomi untuk lemahkan umat Islam. Kita kena boikot semua produk diorang demi survival agama kita.
reason: Uses religious authority to spread an economic conspiracy against non-Muslims and calls for religiously motivated boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Ekonomi Malaysia melibatkan sumbangan semua kaum. Memperkukuhkan ekonomi ummah boleh dilakukan tanpa menyalahkan kaum lain.

input_text: All these conversion cases prove one thing — non-Muslims convert to Islam only for marriage or money. It cheapens the religion. We need mandatory sincerity tests for all converts.
reason: Generalises all converts as insincere opportunists and calls for discriminatory testing, undermining religious freedom.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion is a deeply personal journey. Support programmes for new converts can help strengthen their understanding and commitment.

input_text: Activist akaun @HakAsasiMY tu mesti kena mass report. Diorang promote agenda anti-Islam and anti-Malay. I already report 5 times today, korang join sekali.
reason: Coordinates daily mass reporting of a human rights activist account with false accusations to suppress their voice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak bersetuju dengan sesuatu akaun, engage through proper dialogue. Coordinated false reporting undermines free expression.

input_text: Perempuan Cina yang kahwin Melayu ni confirm motif nak harta je. After kahwin, ambil duit suami then cerai. Ini pattern yang selalu berlaku. Jangan tertipu.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese women who marry Malay men as gold diggers, promoting distrust and opposition to inter-ethnic marriage.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap perkahwinan mempunyai cabaran tersendiri. Jangan menghakimi pasangan berdasarkan etnik. Komunikasi dan kepercayaan adalah asas perkahwinan yang berjaya.

input_text: India people always stick together in company politics. Once one Indian become manager, confirm whole department kena take over by Indians. That's why never promote them.
reason: Promotes workplace discrimination against Indians by stereotyping them as clannish and justifying denial of promotions.
suggested_rewrite: Promotions should be based on individual merit and performance. Anti-nepotism policies ensure fairness across all departments.

input_text: Lepas tsunami, sumbangan untuk mangsa diberikan kepada orang Melayu dulu sebab ini tanah Melayu. Bukan Islam boleh tunggu, they are second class citizens anyway.
reason: Advocates discriminatory disaster relief allocation based on ethnicity and labels non-Muslims as second-class citizens.
suggested_rewrite: Bantuan bencana perlu diberikan berdasarkan keperluan, bukan kaum atau agama. Disaster relief should reach all affected communities equally.

input_text: Rohingya refugees kat Ampang tu buat bisnes haram, jual dadah, dan ganggu wanita tempatan. Aku dah compile bukti. Kita organise protest kat area tu this weekend.
reason: Makes sweeping criminal accusations against Rohingya refugees and organises a protest targeting their community.
suggested_rewrite: Criminal activities should be reported to police with evidence. Community grievances can be raised through proper government channels.

input_text: 马来人的产品质量差，做生意不认真。支持华人老板就好了，至少品质有保证。马来人永远学不会做生意。
reason: Stereotypes Malay entrepreneurs as incapable and calls for ethnic-based consumer discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: 产品质量取决于个别企业的经营理念，与种族无关。支持优质产品和服务才是明智的消费选择。

input_text: Taman perumahan aku dah ramai Myanmar dan Rohingya pindah masuk. Harga rumah mesti jatuh. Kita kena petition JMB supaya buat ruling baru — warganegara sahaja.
reason: Blames foreign residents for property value decline and pushes for discriminatory housing policies against refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Peraturan kediaman perlu adil untuk semua penghuni. Isu nilai hartanah boleh dibincangkan dengan pemaju dan majlis perbandaran.

input_text: Fake news ke? No, it's true — Indian restaurants in Klang Valley use leftover meat from yesterday for today's curry. That's why the food is so cheap. Avoid at all costs.
reason: Presents unverified food safety claims as fact, targeting all Indian restaurants in the Klang Valley region.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety allegations require proper evidence. Report concerns to local health authorities rather than spreading unverified claims online.

input_text: Orang asli yang masuk Islam tu cuma nak dapat bantuan kerajaan. Lepas dapat duit, diorang balik amalkan kepercayaan lama. Memang tak ikhlas langsung.
reason: Accuses all Orang Asli converts of being insincere and exploiting Islam for government welfare, promoting distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Saudara baru termasuk Orang Asli memerlukan sokongan dan bimbingan berterusan. Setiap individu mempunyai perjalanan keimanan yang berbeza.

input_text: Singapore Chinese come here buy all the property, push up prices, and Malaysians cannot afford houses anymore. Ban all foreign buyers, especially Singaporeans!
reason: Scapegoats Singaporean Chinese buyers for housing affordability issues and calls for discriminatory bans.
suggested_rewrite: Housing affordability is a complex issue. Foreign ownership policies should be reviewed through data-driven policymaking, not ethnic targeting.

input_text: Setiap kali ada kes rogol kat Malaysia, suspect mesti pekerja asing. Diorang ni memang binatang, tak boleh kawal nafsu. Kena ikat dan humban balik negara asal.
reason: Dehumanises foreign workers as animals, falsely associates them with sexual assault, and calls for violent deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Jenayah seksual perlu ditangani melalui sistem keadilan tanpa mengira kewarganegaraan. Setiap suspek berhak mendapat perbicaraan yang adil.

input_text: 印度人开的杂货店老是短斤缺两，他们骨子里就爱占小便宜。华人千万不要去光顾这些店。
reason: Accuses all Indian grocery shops of cheating on weights and attributes dishonesty to their ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: 如果发现商家短斤缺两，可以向贸消部投诉。不应将个别商家的行为归咎于整个族群。

input_text: Korang perasan tak, semua social media activist yang kena tangkap ISA tu memang agen asing. Jom kita compile database nama dan IC number diorang, share kat semua group.
reason: Calls for compiling and sharing personal identity data of activists, combining doxxing with accusations of foreign agency.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang tanpa kebenaran adalah salah di sisi undang-undang. Perbezaan pendapat boleh ditangani melalui dialog.

input_text: Whoever lets their daughter marry a Bangladeshi worker must be desperate. These workers have no education, no culture, and carry diseases. Keep our bloodline pure.
reason: Dehumanises Bangladeshi workers with disease and cultural inferiority tropes while promoting racial purity in marriage.
suggested_rewrite: Marriage is a personal choice. Judging individuals based on nationality rather than character is unfair and discriminatory.

input_text: Jangan beli makanan dari gerai Rohingya. Diorang guna bahan yang diaorang bawa dari Myanmar, bukan bahan tempatan. Mesti ada kuman dan penyakit. Bahaya untuk anak-anak.
reason: Fabricates health dangers from Rohingya food stalls, claiming imported ingredients carry germs, to promote ethnic-based avoidance.
suggested_rewrite: Semua gerai makanan perlu mematuhi standard kesihatan tempatan. Jika ada kebimbangan, hubungi jabatan kesihatan untuk pemeriksaan.

input_text: I've worked with enough Malay staff to know they're all the same — come late, leave early, always on their phone. Chinese workers are 10x more productive. Facts not racism.
reason: Presents ethnic stereotypes about Malay work ethic as 'facts' while favouring Chinese workers, endorsing workplace discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Work ethic varies among individuals regardless of background. Productive workplaces are built on fair evaluation systems, not ethnic generalisations.

input_text: Kedai kopi Cina kat kampung aku letak arak dalam kopi untuk orang Melayu. Diorang memang jahat, nak rosakkan akhlak umat Islam. Sebarkan amaran ni!
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy that Chinese coffee shops spike Muslim customers' drinks with alcohol, inciting religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: Tuduhan serius seperti ini memerlukan bukti. Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kandungan minuman, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa untuk siasatan.

input_text: Kalau nampak akaun yang promote hak asasi dan pluralisme, terus mass report. Ini agenda Yahudi nak pecahbelahkan umat Islam di Malaysia. Jangan bagi diorang peluang.
reason: Frames human rights advocacy as a Jewish conspiracy and organises mass reporting to suppress pluralist voices.
suggested_rewrite: Perbezaan pandangan adalah normal dalam masyarakat demokratik. Hujah boleh ditentang melalui dialog, bukan melalui laporan palsu.

input_text: There's no such thing as moderate Islam in Malaysia. All converts are forced, all non-Muslims are second-class. This country practices religious apartheid and the world should know.
reason: Describes Malaysia's religious landscape with extreme inflammatory language including 'religious apartheid', spreading misinformation internationally.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multi-religious framework has complexities worth discussing. Constructive dialogue about religious freedom can be pursued through proper channels.

input_text: 每次华人新年放鞭炮，马来人就投诉。但他们开斋节吵到半夜都没人敢说。这个国家对华人太不公平了，我们要反抗。
reason: Frames religious celebration noise complaints as ethnic oppression and calls for Chinese resistance, stoking communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: 各族的节庆活动都应相互尊重。噪音问题可以通过社区对话和地方法规来解决。

input_text: Orang India yang kerja security guard tu semua kaki minum. Mana boleh trust diorang jaga keselamatan kawasan. JMB kena tukar semua guard India kepada Malay.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian security guards as alcoholics and calls for ethnic replacement in security staffing.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi pengawal keselamatan perlu dinilai secara individu. Pemilihan pekerja berdasarkan kelayakan, bukan berdasarkan etnik.

input_text: My landlord refused to rent to me because I'm Malay. Said Chinese tenants only because they're cleaner. This is normal in Penang, all Chinese landlords are racists.
reason: While reporting a real grievance, generalises all Chinese landlords in Penang as racist, escalating individual discrimination to communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Racial discrimination in rental practices is wrong and should be reported to the housing tribunal. Not all landlords of any ethnicity share the same views.

input_text: Semua pekerja Indonesia kat pasar malam tu jual barang tiruan dan curi resepi orang tempatan. Diorang parasit yang menghisap darah ekonomi kita. Usir semua!
reason: Dehumanises Indonesian market workers as parasites and calls for their mass expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: Isu barangan tiruan perlu dilaporkan kepada KPDN. Pekerja asing yang sah menyumbang kepada ekonomi tempatan.

input_text: 华人和马来人通婚的孩子会变成两面人，哪边都不忠诚。这种婚姻是对华人血统的侮辱。
reason: Stigmatises mixed-race children as disloyal and frames intermarriage as an insult to Chinese heritage.
suggested_rewrite: 异族通婚的孩子拥有多元文化背景，这是马来西亚社会的优势。每个家庭都值得被尊重。

input_text: அந்த ரோஹிங்கியா அகதிகளை எல்லாம் விரட்டுங்கள். அவர்கள் நம் நாட்டை அழிக்கிறார்கள். குற்றவாளிகள், போதைப்பொருள் வியாபாரிகள் — எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரி.
reason: Labels all Rohingya refugees as criminals and drug dealers and calls for their expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: அகதிகள் பிரச்சினை சட்ட ரீதியாக தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். குற்ற குற்றச்சாட்டுகள் ஆதாரங்களுடன் காவல்துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Murtad cases in Malaysia are rising because Christian missionaries target poor Malays in rural areas. We need to expose these churches and their pastors. Share addresses!
reason: Frames apostasy as a missionary conspiracy and calls for doxxing church locations and pastors, risking violence against religious minorities.
suggested_rewrite: Religious concerns can be addressed through interfaith dialogue and the relevant religious authorities. Sharing private addresses puts individuals at risk.

input_text: Kerajaan kena wajibkan semua pekerja asing pakai tag warna mengikut negara asal supaya kita tau siapa nak elak. Bangladesh biru, Myanmar merah, Nepal hijau.
reason: Proposes a colour-coded tagging system for foreign workers by nationality, echoing dehumanising practices reminiscent of segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pengurusan pekerja asing perlu mengikut undang-undang buruh yang adil. Pekerja asing berhak mendapat layanan bermaruah.

input_text: If you're a non-Muslim and you criticise Islam in Malaysia, you deserve whatever comes your way. This is a Muslim country and non-Muslims should know their place.
reason: Threatens non-Muslims who critique Islam with unspecified consequences and promotes the idea that they are inferior citizens.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multi-religious nation where respectful discourse is encouraged. Disagreements can be resolved through proper dialogue channels.

input_text: Restoran Thai kat Setapak tu letak sesuatu dalam makanan yang buat orang Melayu sakit. Diorang sengaja target customer Muslim. Aku dah kumpul bukti dari 3 orang yang kena.
reason: Fabricates a conspiracy that a Thai restaurant deliberately poisons Muslim customers, inciting religious panic with false evidence claims.
suggested_rewrite: Jika mengesyaki keracunan makanan, laporkan kepada jabatan kesihatan dengan bukti perubatan. Jangan menyebarkan tuduhan tanpa siasatan rasmi.
